description: An Athena session is a Spark-based interactive environment for running calculations within a workgroup.

Arn.markdownDescription:
The ARN of the session.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

SessionId.markdownDescription:
The session ID.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 256  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

WorkGroup.markdownDescription:
The workgroup to which the session belongs.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^[a-zA-Z0-9._-]{1,128}$  
Update requires: Replacement
